concerns.text: Tasks T033-T036 all marked [P] but modify shared files (buffer.py, consolidation.py). T033/T034 modify buffer.py; T035 modifies consolidation.py; T036 is a report. These cannot run in parallel due to file conflicts.

Tasks T037-T040 all marked [P] but modify shared files (buffer.py, consolidation.py). T037/T040 modify buffer.py; T038/T039 modify consolidation.py. Parallel execution will cause file-write conflicts.
Tasks T041 and T042 both marked [P] but both modify code/agent/base_agent.py. T041 adds noise.py import; T042 modifies base_agent architecture. Cannot run in parallel.

Tasks T054, T055, T056 all marked [P] but all modify code/analysis/scaling.py. T054 adds accuracy measurement; T055 adds speed measurement; T056 adds exponent calculation. File conflicts prevent parallel execution.

T015 implements validation logic in code/metrics/validator.py; T017 adds validation to ensure ≥95% games produce metrics in same file. T017 should be merged into T015 or T015 should include T017's requirements to avoid split implementation.
T016a (CLI flag parsing) is listed after T013-T015 (metrics implementation). CLI should be implemented before or alongside metrics since it orchestrates them. Reorder T016a before T013.
Task numbering is inconsistent: T010 appears before T004-T006-T009. While not a functional dependency issue, this creates confusion. Reorder to T004-T006-T009-T010 or renumber consistently.
